summary: Based on the retrieved posts, the Gurlitt case involves a challenged museum bequest and Nazi-looted objects currently in a state of limbo. Litigation is described as "inevitable," with Reuters citing a corrected flight manifest from case file EC-96 as part of the evidence. Disputed or unresolved aspects include the status of the task force investigation and various questions raised by attendees regarding the handling of the looted objects.
clean_summary: Based on the retrieved posts, the Gurlitt case involves a museum bequest that is currently being challenged, leading to expectations that litigation is inevitable. Following a press release, attendees raised questions regarding the status of the task force investigation and the uncertain status ("limbo") of Nazi-looted objects.
